report_name: US Treasury Sanctions Crypto Exchange and Mixers for Laundering Ransomware Proceeds

threat_actors.name: LockBit
threat_actors.description: A ransomware group that utilized the sanctioned services Cortexchange, ChainScrub, and HelixMix to launder hundreds of millions of dollars in illicit proceeds from their attacks.

threat_actors.name: Qilin
threat_actors.description: A ransomware group that utilized the sanctioned services Cortexchange, ChainScrub, and HelixMix to launder illicit proceeds from their attacks.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like LockBit and Qilin encrypt victim data to extort payments. The proceeds from these attacks were subsequently laundered through the sanctioned cryptocurrency services.

malware.name: LockBit Ransomware
malware.description: Ransomware used by the LockBit group. Proceeds from its use were laundered through sanctioned services like Cortexchange, ChainScrub, and HelixMix.

malware.name: Qilin Ransomware
malware.description: Ransomware used by the Qilin group. Proceeds from its use were laundered through sanctioned services like Cortexchange, ChainScrub, and HelixMix.

infrastructure.name: Cortexchange
infrastructure.description: A virtual currency exchange with lax AML/KYC regulations, sanctioned by OFAC for its role in laundering funds for ransomware groups like LockBit and Qilin.

infrastructure.name: ChainScrub
infrastructure.description: A cryptocurrency mixing service (tumbler) sanctioned by OFAC for its role in obfuscating the trail of stolen funds for ransomware groups.

infrastructure.name: HelixMix
infrastructure.description: A cryptocurrency mixing service (tumbler) sanctioned by OFAC for its role in obfuscating the trail of stolen funds for ransomware groups.

indicators.name: Cortexchange Cryptocurrency Exchange Traffic
indicators.pattern:
title: Cortexchange Cryptocurrency Exchange Traffic
id: 2b1a9c8d-e4f3-4b1a-8c7d-9e0f1a2b3c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects network traffic to domains associated with the sanctioned cryptocurrency exchange Cortexchange, which has been designated by OFAC for its role in laundering funds for ransomware groups.
references:
  - https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/jy12345
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-26
modified: 2026-04-26
tags:
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.command_and_control
level: high
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains: 'cortexchange'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: This indicator detects network traffic, such as DNS queries, containing the name of the OFAC-sanctioned cryptocurrency exchange 'Cortexchange'. Any communication with this entity is prohibited for U.S. persons and indicates high-risk financial activity.
